candidate_lesson: Trades whose decision path did not call log_forex_decision() (reconstructed-from-fills entries) cluster catastrophically at 1W/5L — untraceable entries are a proxy for entries that bypassed the signal-gating stack entirely and must be blocked, not just logged.
